title: Local Look-Ahead Guidance via Verifier-in-the-Loop for Automated Theorem Proving
key_problems: Tactics not applicable to current proof state
High computational and training costs of RL-based approaches
Inefficiency in beam search due to invalid tactics

existing_approaches.name: AlphaZero-like methods
existing_approaches.characteristics: Search proof space and provide step-wise or holistic solutions

existing_approaches.name: ReProver
existing_approaches.advantages: Order of magnitude smaller complexity and training time
existing_approaches.disadvantages: Generates syntactically incorrect or inapplicable tactics

existing_approaches.name: Feedback-based alignment methods
existing_approaches.characteristics: Use rewards from human feedback or other reward models

proposed_solution: Fine-tuning a pre-trained model that uses feedback from the verification tool
key_contributions: Addressing issues with syntactically incorrect and inapplicable tactics
Preserving computational efficiency while improving tactic quality
Implementing trajectory-level preferences in mathematical reasoning
Applicability to episodic reasoning tasks with stepwise verification
